creator: jfc@mit.edu
text:
This is the failing shell command, with /tmp/work being any scratch directory you like.  Run it in in a qemu-emulated arm64 world with ruby 3.3 installed.

# gem unpack --target=/tmp/work /distfiles/rubygem/asciidoctor-2.0.22.gem
Unpacked gem: '/tmp/work/asciidoctor-2.0.22'
<jemalloc>: jemalloc_rtree.c:205: Failed assertion: "!dependent || leaf != NULL"
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
